# events

Append-only audit event log, one row per event. Partitioned by tenant.

Queries must always supply `tenant_id` as a partition key condition to avoid full-table scans.

## Gotchas

- No updates or deletes. All writes are `PutItem` with a fresh sort key.
- `payload` is a raw JSON string — use `json_parse()` in PartiQL to filter on nested fields.
